rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RUFINA G. MARINAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Establishing Right To Property Deposited With County Treasurer And For Distribution
rulings.Rulings: continued to august 20, 2019 (first available date). a proof of service of notice of hearing filed contemporaneously with the petition that requires notice is not valid, as the POS states the notice was mailed (past tense) and notice cannot be mailed prior to the petition requiring notice being filed. so either notice was mailed before the amended petition was filed or the POS was signed prior to notice actually being mailed, either one of which is invalid. new notice must be mailed no later than 8/5/19 with new POS of the NOH filed no later than 8/13/19.
